title: UX Strategy Immersive
summary: Learn how to research, map, and design digital experiences that align user needs with business goals.
description: This immersive course helps learners build a strategic UX mindset through user research, journey mapping, prioritization, and polished concept presentation.
outcomes: Create a full UX strategy deck for a digital product
Run lightweight research and synthesize insights
Translate findings into product and design priorities

title: Data Analytics Pro
summary: Build confidence with spreadsheets, SQL, dashboards, and storytelling techniques used by modern analytics teams.
description: A practical analytics program focused on turning raw information into clear business recommendations through hands-on practice and guided projects.
outcomes: Present insights with confidence and context

title: Growth Marketing Lab
summary: Design smarter campaigns using acquisition, retention, experimentation, and performance measurement frameworks.
description: This lab-style course walks through channel planning, content funnels, campaign optimization, and practical experimentation methods.

title: Product Management Sprint
summary: Sharpen your product thinking with frameworks for discovery, prioritization, roadmapping, and stakeholder communication.
description: A high-clarity program for aspiring and early-career product managers who want to lead product conversations and build better decisions.
outcomes: Prioritize initiatives using evidence and tradeoffs

title: AI Product Playbook
summary: Learn how to ship AI-assisted features, evaluate tradeoffs, and align teams around practical product decisions.
description: A modern product course focused on translating AI capability into customer value through strategy, experimentation, and execution.
outcomes: Identify useful AI opportunities for a product

title: Data Storytelling Essentials
summary: Turn metrics into narratives that help teams understand performance and make stronger decisions.
description: Learn how to structure data stories, choose useful visuals, and communicate insight clearly to non-technical audiences.
outcomes: Build a story around a dashboard or report
Choose the right visual for each metric
Present data with confidence and clarity

title: Design Systems Foundation
summary: Create scalable components, tokens, and documentation that keep product design consistent.
description: A practical course for designers who want to build and maintain modern design systems used across product teams.

title: Digital Campaign Essentials
summary: Plan, launch, and optimize digital campaigns across channels with a practical, performance-first approach.
description: A compact marketing program covering campaign setup, audience targeting, creative testing, and reporting.
outcomes: Build a campaign plan from scratch
